message:
Add E2E scenario tests for FFT backend routing (FSCI-P2C-005)

New e2e_fft.rs implementing bd-3jh.16.7 acceptance criteria with
three scenario categories: happy-path (signal→FFT→filter→IFFT→compare),
error recovery (wrong input→catch→correct→retry), and adversarial
(degenerate signals, edge sizes). Each scenario emits forensic log
bundles to fixtures/artifacts/FSCI-P2C-005/e2e/ with step-by-step
timing, artifact references, and environment metadata.

- crates/fsci-conformance/tests/e2e_fft.rs: new E2E test file with
  10 scenarios covering FFT round-trip, filtering, error handling,
  and adversarial edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
